attempts.prompt:
You are helping a robotic planning task. 
    Given the image of a scene and an instruction, generate the PDDL file with objects, initial state, and goal specification.
    Your output should adhere to the constraints defined in the domain file.
    You must output the PDDL file in the correct format.
    Examples of PDDL problems given a different domain instruction:
    Domain: hanoi
    Instruction: Move all disks to the rightmost peg.
    PDDL problem:
    (define (problem hanoi3)
        (:domain hanoi)
        (:objects
            peg1
            peg2
            orange_disk1
            orange_disk2
        )
            (:init
                (clear orange_disk1)
                (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)
                (on orange_disk2 peg1)
            )
        (:goal (and (on orange_disk2 peg2) (on orange_disk1 orange_disk2)))
    )
    
    For the current domain, this is the domain file:
    (define (domain put_task)
 (:requirements
  :adl
 )
 (:types
  agent
  microwave fridge sink - receptacle  ; an object is a receptacle if it can hold things
  knife receptacle - object           ; if not an receptacle, default to object
  )


 (:predicates
    (openable ?r - receptacle)                                ; true if a receptacle is openable
    (opened ?r - receptacle)                                  ; true if a receptacle is opened
    (inReceptacle ?o - object ?r - object)                ; object ?o is in receptacle ?r
    (holds ?a - agent ?o - object)                            ; object ?o is held by agent ?a
    (holdsAny ?a - agent)                                     ; agent ?a holds an object
    (isClean ?o - object)                                     ; true if the object has been clean in sink
    (isHot ?o - object)                                       ; true if the object has been heated up
    (isCool ?o - object)                                      ; true if the object has been cooled
    (isOn ?o - object)                                        ; true if the object is on
    (isToggled ?o - object)                                   ; true if the object has been toggled
    (isSliced ?o - object)                                    ; true if the object is sliced
    (atLocation ?a - agent ?o - object)
 )

;; agent goes to receptacle
 (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?a - agent ?lEnd - object)
    :precondition (and
            (not (atLocation ?a ?lEnd))
            )
    :effect (and
                (atLocation ?a ?lEnd)
                (forall (?l - object)
                    (when (and (atLocation ?a ?l) (not (= ?l ?lEnd)))
                        (not (atLocation ?a ?l))))
                (forall (?l - object)
                     (when (inReceptacle ?l ?lEnd) (atLocation ?a ?l)))
            )
 )

;; agent opens receptacle
 (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (opened ?r)
            )
 )
;; agent closes receptacle
 (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (openable ?r)
            (opened ?r)
            )
    :effect (and
                (not (opened ?r))
            )

 )

;; agent picks up object
 (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
    :effect (and
                (holds ?a ?o)
                (holdsAny ?a)
                (forall (?r - receptacle)
                    (not (inReceptacle ?o ?r))
                )
            )
 )

;; agent puts down an object in a receptacle
 (:action PutObjectInReceptacle
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (inReceptacle ?o ?r)
                (not (holds ?a ?o))
                (not (holdsAny ?a))
            )
 )

;; agent cleans some object
 (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - sink ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isClean ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent heats-up some object
 (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - microwave ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isHot ?o)
            )
 )

;; agent cools some object
 (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?r - fridge ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?r)
            (holds ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isCool ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent toggle object
 (:action ToggleObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?o - object)
    :precondition (and
            (atLocation ?a ?o)
            )
    :effect (and
                (when (isOn ?o)
                    (not (isOn ?o)))
                (when (not (isOn ?o))
                    (isOn ?o))
                (isToggled ?o)
            )
 )


;; agent slices some object with a knife
 (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?a - agent ?co - object ?ko - knife)
    :precondition
            (and
                (atLocation ?a ?co)
                (holds ?a ?ko)
            )
    :effect (and
                (isSliced ?co)
            )
 )


)
    
        The image of the scene has been provided.
        Please first analyze the image and then generate the PDDL problem.
        
    The robot is initially not at any object's location. It needs to first go to a location to interact with an object. If an object A can hold another object B, it is a receptacle and must be recognized as such.
    Instruction: Move two credit cards to the table. from the television stand.
    

SCENE CAPTION:
Scene Description:

The scene depicts a room with a television stand and a nearby table, both serving as key locations for the task. The primary objects of interest are two red credit cards, which are currently resting on the surface of the television stand.

1.  Objects and their types:
    - Credit Card 1: A small, rectangular, red object with white markings, positioned on the left side of the television stand's top surface.
    - Credit Card 2: A second small, rectangular, red object with white markings, positioned on the right side of the television stand's top surface, near a black pen.
    - Television Stand: A light beige, two-drawer cabinet with a curved base to support a television. It functions as a receptacle (though not explicitly openable in the domain, it holds objects on its surface). It is located next to a green sofa and on a red patterned carpet.
    - Table: A dark brown, flat-surfaced table with a laptop, a mug, a lamp, and a book on it. This is the destination receptacle for the credit cards. It is situated near two reddish-brown chairs.
    - Pen: A black, slender object standing vertically on the television stand, next to Credit Card 2.
    - Television: A large, dark-screened device with a grey frame, sitting on the television stand. It is not relevant to the domain types.
    - Sofa: A large, green, upholstered piece of furniture positioned to the right of the television stand. It is not a receptacle.
    - Carpet: A red carpet with a repeating yellow circular pattern, covering the floor.

2.  Quantities:
    - Credit Cards: 2
    - Television Stands: 1
    - Tables: 1
    - Pens: 1

3.  Spatial Relationships:
    - Both credit cards are located on the top surface of the television stand.
    - The television stand is positioned to the left of the green sofa.
    - The table is located in a different area of the room, separate from the television stand, and is the target location for the credit cards.
    - The pen is on the television stand, adjacent to Credit Card 2.

4.  Current State:
    - The credit cards are not being held by any agent.
    - The credit cards are not in any receptacle; they are on the surface of the television stand.
    - The television stand and table are both static and not toggled, heated, cooled, or sliced.
    - The agent is not currently at the location of any object.

5.  Visual Properties:
    - The credit cards are distinctively red with white text or symbols, making them easily identifiable.
    - The television stand is a light beige color with two visible drawers and a dark, curved base.
    - The table is dark brown and has various items on it, including a laptop with a black keyboard, a beige mug, and a lamp with a brown base.
    - The surrounding environment includes a green sofa and a red and yellow patterned carpet, which help in orienting the spatial layout.

Based on the above scene caption, the images, and the instruction, generate the PDDL problem file.
Use the caption to understand what objects are present and their current state.
Make sure the PDDL problem accurately reflects the scene described in the caption.

Generate the PDDL problem:
attempts.response:
```pddl
(define (problem move_credit_cards)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        agent1 - agent
        credit_card1 - object
        credit_card2 - object
        tv_stand - receptacle
        table - receptacle
        pen - object
    )
    (:init
        (atLocation agent1 tv_stand) ; Agent starts at the TV stand to pick up the cards
        (inReceptacle credit_card1 tv_stand)
        (inReceptacle credit_card2 tv_stand)
        (not (holdsAny agent1))
    )
    (:goal (and
        (inReceptacle credit_card1 table)
        (inReceptacle credit_card2 table)
    ))
)
```
attempts.problem:
(define (problem move_credit_cards)
    (:domain put_task)
    (:objects
        agent1 - agent
        credit_card1 - object
        credit_card2 - object
        tv_stand - receptacle
        table - receptacle
        pen - object
    )
    (:init
        (atLocation agent1 tv_stand) ; Agent starts at the TV stand to pick up the cards
        (inReceptacle credit_card1 tv_stand)
        (inReceptacle credit_card2 tv_stand)
        (not (holdsAny agent1))
    )
    (:goal (and
        (inReceptacle credit_card1 table)
        (inReceptacle credit_card2 table)
    ))
)
attempts.plan:
(gotolocation agent1 credit_card1)
(pickupobject agent1 credit_card1)
(gotolocation agent1 table)
(putobjectinreceptacle agent1 credit_card1 table)
(gotolocation agent1 tv_stand)
(pickupobject agent1 credit_card2)
(gotolocation agent1 table)
(putobjectinreceptacle agent1 credit_card2 table)
